name: Penne in Vodka Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces fresh ripe tomatoes; peeled, seeded & chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried red peppers in vodka for 24 hours.
2. In a heavy large saucepan, combine cream, butter and tomatoes. Simmer until reduced by 1/3, about 12 minutes.
3. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and add to sauce. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Discard the red peppers, and add vodka to the pasta. Simmer until sauce thickens, stirring constantly, about 3 minutes.
5. Mix in 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley. Serve immediately, passing additional Parmesan cheese and pepper separately.
